summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3+4 features for multi-tenant SaaS platform. Successfully tested enhanced dashboard with Revenue/Reviews/Loyalty/Reservations KPIs, Reviews system with sentiment analysis and AI replies, Offers creation with payment simulation, Connector framework integration, and all guest panels. Backend API tests: 96% success rate, Frontend tests: 100% success rate.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for offer creation
minor_issues.impact: Functional - offer is created successfully, just wrong status code

passed_tests: ✅ Enhanced Dashboard KPIs (Revenue: £1,050.00, Reviews: 12 (3.6/5), Loyalty: 0 members, Reservations: 0 offers)
✅ Reviews Page (12 reviews with sentiment analysis - 8 Positive, 2 Neutral, 2 Negative)
✅ Review Reply System (AI suggestion panel working, reply submission successful)
✅ Offers Creation (John Test offer at ₹350.00 created successfully)
✅ Payment Flow (Generate payment link → Simulate payment → Reservation created)
✅ Connectors Page (WhatsApp, Instagram, Google Reviews, TripAdvisor as 'Coming Soon', Web Chat as 'Active')
✅ Guest Room Panel /g/grand-hotel/room/R101 (request submission working with categories)
✅ Guest Table Panel /g/grand-hotel/table/T1 (menu display, add to cart, View Cart functionality)
✅ All existing features (Requests: 19 items, Orders, Rooms, Tables, Menu, Contacts, Settings, Inbox)
✅ API Health (24/25 backend tests passed, all critical endpoints functional)
✅ Review seeding with FAKE_REVIEWS data (automatic seeding on page load)
✅ AI Mock Provider (mock_template_v1 generating context-aware replies)
✅ Stripe Stub Provider (payment simulation working end-to-end)
✅ Multi-language support (English/Turkish reviews and AI responses)

success_percentage.guest_panels: 100% (both room and table panels fully functional)
success_percentage.phase3_4_features: 100% (Reviews, Offers, Connectors, Enhanced Dashboard all working)
